title: Cold Reach
description: Fully autonomous job-hunting platform that scrapes LinkedIn, finds recruiter emails via a 9-method enrichment pipeline, and auto-applies to roles — zero manual input per job cycle.
longDescription:
Cold Reach is a fully autonomous job-hunting platform built solo from scratch. It scrapes LinkedIn for internship postings published in the last 24 hours, identifies recruiters at each company via People Search, and enriches their contact info through a 9-method email-finding pipeline spanning Hunter, Apollo, Snov, PDL, Google, GitHub, and SMTP pattern matching.

For Easy Apply roles, a Playwright automation layer powered by a local LLM handles screening questions and submits applications without any manual input. The full stack includes a Node.js + Playwright companion service, a React + Supabase dashboard for tracking applications and pipeline status, a Chrome extension, and a Dockerized deployment on Oracle Cloud running on a cron schedule — 8am scrape, 9am and 9pm apply cycles.
